Power your sales or recruiting AI agent: Power your sales or recruiting AI agent with live B2B data. DataForB2B is a people and company search API with 70+ filters including job title, skills, company size, LinkedIn URL, funding stage, investor, past employers, certifications, years of experience, GitHub repositories, languages and more.
Your DataForB2B API key. Get it from htt: Your DataForB2B API key. Get it from https://app.dataforb2b.ai
Find professionals using 50+ filters (ti: Find professionals using 50+ filters (title, company, LinkedIn URL, skills, location, education, funding...).
Find companies with advanced filters (in: Find companies with advanced filters (industry, LinkedIn URL, size, location, growth, funding, investor...).
Describe who you are looking for in plai: Describe who you are looking for in plain language. An AI agent builds the best filters and runs the search. It may return status "needs_input" with questions — answer by calling again with the returned session_id and an answers object.
Resolve the exact stored value for a sea: Resolve the exact stored value for a search filter (company, industry, category, location, school, title, skill, investor). Use it before filtering, or when a search returns few/no results.
Retrieve detailed professional data, wor: Retrieve detailed professional data, work/personal email and phone for a person.
Retrieve comprehensive information about: Retrieve comprehensive information about a company.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Effectuer un appel API personnalisé vers un point de terminaison spécifique
Conditions used to filter the search: Conditions used to filter the search
Optional raw filter group, e.g. {\"op\":: Optional raw filter group, e.g. {"op":"or","conditions":[{"column":"skill","type":"like","value":"python"}]}. Merged with the filters above.
Pagination offset - number of results to: Pagination offset - number of results to skip
Enrich results with fresh live data: Enrich results with fresh live data
Plain-language description, e.g. \"Heads: Plain-language description, e.g. "Heads of Sales at French fintech scale-ups" (max 3000 chars). Required on the first call.
Whether to search people or companies: Whether to search people or companies
Number of results for the final search (: Number of results for the final search (1-100)
Session id returned by a previous call. Send it back to answer questions or refine the same search.
Answers to a needs_input turn, e.g. {\"c: Answers to a needs_input turn, e.g. {"company_size":"201-500"}. Requires Session ID.
Enrich results with fresh live data inst: Enrich results with fresh live data instead of cached data
Partial text to autocomplete (1-100 char: Partial text to autocomplete (1-100 characters), e.g. "pyth"
LinkedIn URL, public ID, or encoded ID: LinkedIn URL, public ID, or encoded ID
Company slug, LinkedIn URL, or encoded I: Company slug, LinkedIn URL, or encoded ID
Authorization headers are injected autom: Les en-têtes d'autorisation sont injectés automatiquement depuis votre connexion.
